text:
### [ F79 International Maintenance Obligations: Communication with the Central Authority for England and Wales E+W


9.26AA. — (1) Where the Lord Chancellor requests information or a document from the court officer for the relevant court for the purposes of F80 ... Articles 12 or 25(2) of the 2007 Hague Convention , the court officer shall provide the requested information or document to the Lord Chancellor forthwith.


(2) In this rule, “relevant court” means the court at which an application under F81 ... Article 10 of the 2007 Hague Convention has been filed.


[The Lord Chancellor is the Central Authority for England and Wales in relation to the 2007 Hague Convention F82 ... ] ]


Textual Amendments


F79 Rule 9.26AA inserted (20.12.2012) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 4) Rules 2012 (S.I. 2012/2806) , rules 1 , 13


F80 Words in rule 9.26AA(1) omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 8(10)(a) (with reg. 23 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(b) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)


F81 Words in rule 9.26AA(2) omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 8(10)(b) (with reg. 23 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(b) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)
